creator: ssw01@mathistry.net
text:
Created attachment 253864
Build log

I'm filing this under Ports & Packages because that's where I'm encountering it, but I think it's really a kernel issue.

Back in the 13.2 days, I encountered numerous poudriere build failures with log files indicating EBADF errors.  Based on mailing list and forum postings, I had formed the impression that zfs changes had mostly taken care of this.  However...

A poudriere bulk build on a brand spankin' new 14.1-RELEASE-p5 system just croaked early in the process with the same symptoms.

Log file attached.
